title: nerve-wml: Substrate-Agnostic Nerve Protocol for Inter-WML Communication
description: A research engine validating a discrete-code communication layer between heterogeneous neural modules (World Model Languages). Eleven gates cover protocol correctness, MLP/LIF polymorphism, merge fine-tuning, resolution of scientific shortcuts, scaling to N=16/N=32 pools, neuroletter-semantics extraction, neuromorphic (Loihi/Akida) INT8 export, dream-of-kiki consolidation bridge, adaptive-alphabet shrink/grow, and a micro-kiki LLM advisor. Paper v0.3 draft included.
